title: The Shrine the Coffer Pointed To
target: open the buried Sevrenne shrine on the south spit of the mire before the bog-cultists rebury it

contributions.line: [mock] Marek (Male) takes on "clear the peat off the lid without breaking the salt-line".
[mock] Veska (Female) takes on "read the bind-script on the lid before it darkens again".
[mock] Imogen (Female) takes on "stand the salt-line against whatever is curious in the reeds".

outcomeNarrative: [mock] The party brings it off cleanly: open the buried Sevrenne shrine on the south spit of the mire before the bog-cultists rebury it.
